definition: In equity drawdowns, SBC expense mechanically increases (more shares needed for same dollar compensation), creating a reverse reflexive loop: a 25% Mag-7 decline increases SBC cost by $15-25B and compresses non-GAAP margins 100-200bp, amplifying the drawdown by 1.5-2.0x.
evidence: 100-200bp non-GAAP margin compression from reflexive SBC increase
Meta 2022 precedent: SBC/revenue rose from ~18% to 25%+
open_questions: Whether companies would restructure compensation to break the loop
Interaction with share buyback programs during drawdowns
